items.title: Vote counting underway for Gujarat local body polls
items.summary: Counting of votes began at 9 a.m. on Tuesday (April 28, 2026), State Election Commission (SEC) officials said

items.title: How South Korea Uses A.I. to Check on Its Elderly
items.summary: In the world’s fastest aging society, artificial intelligence is being used to make care calls to older adults who live alone and to fight dementia.
